steps.title: Recognize the expected shift
steps.content: The passage moves from explaining tickers' historical role to revealing they were “long since retired” by 2008. The signal “long since” conveys that this absence is expected and established—not surprising or caused by the parade.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Of course” works because it signals that the retirement is natural and expected—what “long since” conveys. The other three miss this by adding parallel information, introducing examples, or reversing causality. That matches choice C — C is correct.
